valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Tue 7 Apr 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Wed 8 Apr 2026

Trafalgar.text:
orthwesterly 4 to 6, occasionally 7 at first in east. In north, cyclonic 4 to 6, increasing 6 to gale 8, occasionally severe gale 9 for a time later in west.
Sea state
In south, moderate or rough, becoming rough or very rough. in north, occasionally moderate at first in east, otherwise rough or very rough, becoming very rough or high.
Weather
In south, thundery showers. In north, rain or thundery showers.
Visibility
In south, good. In north, good, occasionally poor.

Gale warning

21:44 (UTC) on Mon 6 Apr 2026
Northwesterly gale force 8 expected soon and increasing severe gale force 9 later
Forecast issued:
23:15 (UTC) on Mon 6 Apr 2026

Trafalgar.weather: In south, thundery showers. In north, rain or thundery showers.
Trafalgar.visibility: In south, good. In north, good, occasionally poor.

FitzRoy.text:
Wind
In south, cyclonic becoming northeasterly, 4 to 6, but 7 to severe gale 9 at first in far west, becoming variable 3 or less in east. In north, northerly or northeasterly, backing southwesterly later in far northwest, 3 to 5, occasionally 6 at first in west.
Sea state
In south, rough or very rough, but high at first in far southwest, becoming rough later. in north, very rough at first in west, otherwise rough, occasionally moderate later.
Weather
In south, thundery showers. In north, occasional rain, fog patches.
Visibility
In south, good, occasionally poor. In north, moderate or good, occasionally very poor.

Gale warning

Severe gale force 9 backing northerly and decreasing gale force 8 imminent
